overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a wizarding school library interior from a video game, showing students in dark robes studying at wooden tables surrounded by towering bookshelves, illuminated by green desk lamps and warm ambient lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand wizarding library interior with students seated at wooden study tables. Towering bookshelves line the walls while a large blue tapestry hangs at the far end, and green desk lamps provide warm illumination over scattered papers and books.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand wizarding library that maintains a mood of scholarly stillness. It begins by capturing the vast interior where students in dark robes are seated at heavy wooden study tables. The camera lingers on the scene as green desk lamps cast a warm, focused glow over scattered papers and open books. This illumination draws the eye toward the towering bookshelves lining the walls before the gaze settles on a large blue tapestry hanging at the far end of the hall.
